channel.title: Writing & Insights on Kavya Jahagirdar
channel.description: Recent content in Writing & Insights on Kavya Jahagirdar

item.title: We were the AI before AI became a thing.
item.description: We were the AI before AI became a thing. There will come a day when my son will look at me, half-curious, half-judgy and ask, “Wait… you people actually searched the internet… without AI?” I can’t wait for him to sit down with his grandma for that one. I can already see her face. The same look she had when I once said Maggi takes too long. She’ll try to explain a time when there was no internet.

item.title: Building Resumey.Pro: Lessons from My First SaaS
item.description: Building Resumey.Pro: Lessons from My First SaaS After spending years in traditional design roles, I made the leap to build my own product. Resumey.Pro started as a simple idea: what if creating a professional resume could be as easy as filling out a form? The Journey The development process taught me several key lessons: 1. Start with the Problem I spent too much time on features nobody asked for. The real breakthrough came when I started talking to users daily.
